name: GOLFTEC Beaverton
address: 240 NW Lost Springs Terrace #36, Portland, OR 97229
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf instruction and training center specializing in personalized lessons and club fittings. Their facilities utilize advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise swing feedback and club optimization. Services include private lessons, on-course playing sessions, practice memberships, and comprehensive club fitting designed to maximize performance and distance.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides detailed swing data and feedback
PGA-certified coaches offer personalized improvement plans based on data analysis
Custom club fitting service uses launch monitors to increase distance by an average of 21 yards

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment including clubs for lessons and fittings. They offer club rentals and a pro shop for purchasing gear.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The content does not specify any food or drink services. It is advisable to check with the individual GOLFTEC location for their policy on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Since GOLFTEC focuses on instruction and practice rather than simulator play, the time for a full 18-hole round is not specified. Sessions are typically structured as lessons or practice time based on your personalized plan.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, utilizing technology like video analysis and launch monitors to help younger golfers understand and improve their game in a supportive environment.
